---
title: Zero Trust Architecture Explained
author: SecChronicles
date: 2024-02-25
description: Never trust, always verify — the principle behind modern security
tags: ["#zerotrust", "#security"]
---
Never trust, always verify. Zero trust is not a product, it is an architecture philosophy.

**Core principles:**
- Verify explicitly — always authenticate and authorize
- Least privilege access — just-in-time permissions
- Assume breach — minimize blast radius
